insights.claim: The population-weighted U.S. average for no checkup is 23.11%.
insights.method_note: Population-weighted mean across ZCTAs with estimates.

insights.claim: The most-deprived ADI tenth averages 3.7 points lower than the least-deprived tenth.
insights.method_note: Population-weighted ADI national-rank decile means; ecological, not causal.

insights.claim: Across ZCTAs, no checkup is most associated with hispanic population share (Spearman rho=0.397, n=32,245).
insights.method_note: Spearman rank correlation; place-level association only.

insights.claim: Highest-burden ZCTA: 99703 (Fairbanks North Star Borough, AK) at 46.1%.
insights.method_note: Maximum ZCTA value; ties broken by population.

insights.claim: About 56.1 million people live in ZCTAs at or above the high-burden threshold (27.5%).
insights.method_note: Population in ZCTAs at or above the 90th percentile (27.5%).
